title: MCLN EX27 Reason Code Enhancements Configuration Guide
fullText:
center 83548 right 309880 EX 2 7 – Reason Code Enhancements CONFIGURATION GUIDE 0 0 EX 2 7 – Reason Code Enhancements CONFIGURATION GUIDE Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc89345832 \h 3 1.1 Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc89345833 \h 3 2. ADD ADDITIONAL CUSTOM CODES PAGEREF _Toc89345834 \h 6 2.1 C-000-EX27 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc89345835 \h 7 2.2 C-E27 ECOM EXTENSION CONTROL Enablement PAGEREF _Toc89345836 \h 8 2.3 Add system code B-051 BYTE 99-99, ex27 rEASON CODE ENABLEMENT PAGEREF _Toc89345837 \h 10 2.4 Add system code B-051 BYTE 98-98, ex27 ECOM rEASON CODE ENABLEMENT PAGEREF _Toc89345838 \h 13 3. ADD B-782-27 FOR WAVE LEVEL ENABLEMENT PAGEREF _Toc89345839 \h 15 3.1 Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc89345840 \h 15 4. ADD TRANSACTION PARAMETERS SHIPMENT ENABLEMENT PAGEREF _Toc89345841 \h 17 4.1 Enablement transaction parameters PAGEREF _Toc89345842 \h 17 1 . GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 ( Global Extens ion Control ) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2. ADD ADDITIONAL CUSTOM CODES 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000 - EX 2 7 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C- 000 - EX 2 7 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. C- E27 ECOM EXTENSION CONTROL Enablement Navigate to system codes UI Click Add Populate below information Save Select C-E27 , Select Code IDs Select Add Populate below information Save Select Parameters Input information below Save Navigate to C-E27-027, enable the flag, save Add system code B-051 BYTE 99-99 , ex27 rEASON CODE ENABLEMENT Navigate to System Codes UI, filter for System Code Type 051 Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Parameters action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click Save . Navigate back to system code 051 . Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code IDs action button in the lower right of the menu. Select the Checkbox for the Reason Code that will be enabled for EX2 7 . Click the blue Parameters tab. Enable byte 99-99. Execute for Line out. Check the box for parameter 99-99 to enable custom functionality for EX27 . Click Save. Repeat same for Bill Error. Check the box for parameter 99-99 to enable custom functionality for EX27 . Click Save. Repeat same for Order Error . Check the box for parameter 99-99 to enable custom functionality for EX2 7 . Click Save. Add system code B-051 BYTE 98-98, ex27 ECOM rEASON CODE ENABLEMENT Navigate to System Codes UI, filter for System Code Type 051 Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Parameters action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click Save. Navigate back to system code 051. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code IDs action button in the lower right of the menu. Select the Checkbox for the Reason Code that will be enabled for EX2 7 . Click the blue Parameters tab. Enable the below byte 98-98 for Bill Error, Order error, and Line out as well as CODE IDs 50-70. Example: B- 051- 062 Restricted. Code Ids 50-70 in the MK environment are checked with EX27 Ecom Reason Code. Any additional EX27 Reason Codes for any other Distribution Centers should be added to this list. Check the box for parameter 98-98 to enable custom functionality for EX27 . Click Save. 3 . ADD B-782-27 FOR WAVE LEVEL ENABLEMENT 3.1 Enablement System Code Navigate to System Codes UI, filter for Base Code 782 Select Code IDs, Select Add, Input below information Open Picking Wave Parameters UI, Select Desired Wave for EX27 Reason Code Enhancements functionality ( currently named “MCLN Shortage Cancel Wave”) Under Special Instructions, select 3 and select EX27 Enabled option, select Save 4 . ADD TRANSACTION PARAMETERS SHIPMENT ENABLEMENT 4.1 Enablement transaction parameters Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI, filter for “Shipments” transaction Select record and select Program Template . Select Add and populate the record with the below information. Navigate to the previous page, select the Shipments transaction, select Edit, enable byte 500-500. Save 5 . ADD RF Cancel/oLPN UI Cancel Reason Codes 5.1 add RF Cancel/oLPN UI Reason Codes Navigate to Base system code 051. Select Code IDs Click Add. Fill in Details and Parameters fields below for Reason Code O , oLPN UI Cancel. Click Save. Repeat steps for Reason Code R , RF Menu Cancel.
